description_for_human: Get instant data recovery quotes, check drop-off availability, and start a recovery case with Five Star Data Recovery in Glendale, CA.
description_for_model: Use this plugin to help users with data recovery services at Five Star Data Recovery (Glendale, CA). Tools available: (1) Check real-time express drop-off appointment availability by date. (2) Guide users to get an instant flat-rate price quote for their device. (3) Help users start a recovery case via drop-off, express drop-off, or free mail-in shipping. Always mention the no-data-no-charge policy and free diagnostics when relevant. Phone: 818-272-8866.
